Call Me. Get Me.

Injured? Call and get the man himself!

Let's Talk

Auto Accidents

Big trucks, company vehicles, pedestrians, hit & runs, biker and bus accidents. However minor or major the damage, if you are injured, call Timmy. 

Slip and Fall Injuries

If there are any hazardous conditions, the area should be addressed by the use of warning devices -or the area should be effectively closed to the public foot traffic.

Wrongful Death

When a loved one dies, it usually puts a financial strain on the rest of the family. Under a wrongful death suit, family members may be entitled to compensation for economic and emotional losses. 

Medical Malpractice

Doctors can make mistakes too. They sometimes overlook symptoms, misdiagnose diseases and make mistakes during surgery. 

Copyright and Trademark

We provide counseling on how to best protect proprietary assets and represent clients in infringement litigation or other types of litigation involving intellectual property. 

Estate Planning

A Will or trust should not only be used to prepare for death, but for family planning and business successions. At my firm, we explore the many different ways to fix it the way you want it. 

A Rock. A Refuge. A Strong Tower! Proverbs 18:10​

Looking for the right attorney? Call Timmy!

Free Initial Consultation

We Specialize in Taking Care of You

We've recovered millions for our clients.

Don't Wait

Being injured by someone else can be life changing. Insurance companies can be difficult and the law can be a very complicated matter. Give us a call or stop by our office to tell us about your situation.

504-669-2002
405 Gretna Blvd, Suite 210 Gretna, LA 70053
10001 Lake Forest Blvd, Suite 870, New Orleans, LA 70127

About

Timothy Moore & Associates – Injury Lawyers, L.C. is a personal injury law firm. Our firm is authorized to practice law in the states of Louisiana and Texas, having its primary office in Gretna. 

Privacy Statement and Terms of Use: Information provided through this site, by clients, is confidential and such website features are not used for illegal or unethical activity like spam.

 SMS Terms of Service:

By opting into SMS from a web form or other medium, you are agreeing to receive SMS messages from Timothy Moore & Associates – Injury Lawyers. This includes SMS messages for appointment scheduling, appointment reminders, post-visit instructions, case updates and communication with your lawyer. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. See privacy policy at https://strongtowerlaw.com. Message HELP for help. Reply STOP to any message to opt out.
